optimizer_breakfast_dinner.notes: Ported as-is from the existing breakfast/dinner engine: role-slot templates + hill-climbing quantity optimizer + weighted scoring (Macro 40% / Protein 20% / Compatibility 20% / Realism 20%). Already implemented in JS, no changes needed.

optimizer_lunch.notes: New — did not exist before. Mirrors the exact engine structure of optimizer_breakfast_dinner (roles, templates, compatibility overrides, hill-climbing discrete portion optimizer, same 40/20/20/20 scoring weights) so the existing JS engine can be reused unmodified, just pointed at this food_database + these templates/pair_overrides for the lunch flow. Nutrition values are per-gram/per-piece scientific estimates (USDA-style / standard Lebanese-cuisine composition) since exact lab data for these composite dishes isn't publicly standardized — recommend validating high-priority items (chicken, meat, fish, rice) against your own lab/nutrition-panel data if precision matters.
